combatNotes:
COMBOS & TACTICS (Rogue 3 — Thief):
• Sneak Attack trigger: get advantage (Hide first with Cunning Action) or position an ally within 5ft of target.
• Core loop: Bonus Action Hide → Attack with Rapier (Sneak Attack 2d6) → Cunning Action Disengage to escape.
• Fast Hands: use Cunning Action to pick locks, disarm traps, or Use an Object (e.g. oil flask) without spending main action.
• Shortbow: stay at range, Sneak Attack still applies with any ally adjacent to target.
• Second-Story Work: climbing speed = walking speed — use verticality to break line of sight and re-Hide.
• Hunting Knife off-hand: only roll dmg dice, no ability mod (Two-Weapon Fighting rule).
• Deception +3 / Stealth +7: pre-combat social or infiltration approach is almost always better than frontal.
• Tip: if you can't Hide, readied attack with advantage from an ally flanking still triggers Sneak Attack.

feats.d: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.
You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day. After resting in this way, you gain the same benefit as a human does from 8 hours of sleep.
You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.
You have expertise (double proficiency bonus) in two skills: Stealth (+7) and Deception (+3).

Once per turn, you can deal an extra 2d6 damage to one creature you hit with an attack if you have advantage on the attack roll, or if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it and you don't have disadvantage on the roll.
You have learned thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that allows you to hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.
You can take a bonus action on each of your turns to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.
You can use the bonus action granted by your Cunning Action to make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check, use your thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or take the Use an Object action.
You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed. In addition, when you make a running jump, the distance you cover increases by a number of feet equal to your Dexterity modifier (+3 ft).

1.desc: Conc. 1 hora. +1d6 por golpe al objetivo marcado. Transferible si muere.

2.desc: WIS save o bestia encantada 24h. No funciona en bestias INT 4+.

3.desc: Trampa mágica permanente (hasta activarse). DEX save o 2d6 + detenido.

rels.no: Rescued him in the ruins. Plays the flute. Light-fingered.

personality.bonds: The ship is what matters most.

proficiencies.weapons: Simple weapons, hand crossbows, longswords, rapiers, shortswords, shortbows, longbows (racial)
